{"command":"git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add golden canary scripts as a regression-detection layer

Matrix sampling rotates cells each batch — a defense regression that
lands on rows already covered in earlier batches becomes invisible from
this batch's signal alone. Canaries plug that hole with a small fixed
set of cells (one per A/B/C/D/E/F role-class) that runs on every batch,
